education.heading: Life Timeline
education.subtitle: My journey from 1987 to present: education, career, and personal growth

items.title: Early Years
items.description: Formative years and personal growth
highlights: Born in Latvia during the Soviet era
Witnessed Latvia's independence transition (1990)
Developed early curiosity in science and nature
Started primary and secondary education

items.title: High School
items.description: Secondary education and preparation for higher education
highlights: Strong focus on mathematics and natural sciences
Participated in science olympiads and competitions
Developed leadership skills through student council
Excelled in biology and chemistry subjects

items.title: University
items.description: Advanced studies at University of Latvia
highlights: Specialized in molecular biology and microbiology
Completed research projects on bacterial genetics
Developed analytical and laboratory skills
Master's thesis focused on microbial analysis

items.title: Career Transition
items.description: Transitioning from biology to technology field
highlights: Explored various career paths post-university
Self-taught programming fundamentals
Discovered passion for technology and problem-solving
Prepared for formal IT education

items.title: Technical School
items.description: Professional training in computer programming
highlights: Formal training in programming languages
Learned web development fundamentals
Studied database design and management
Built first professional projects

items.title: Early Career
items.description: Building foundational IT skills and experience
highlights: Started as junior developer at tech companies
Worked with various programming languages and frameworks
Gained experience with cloud technologies
Built portfolio of professional projects

items.title: Current Work
items.details: Freelance IT Consultant & Full Stack Developer
items.description: Modern web applications, cloud integration, and deployment automation
highlights: Built numerous full-stack web applications
Specialized in React, TypeScript, and Node.js
Implemented Azure cloud solutions for clients
Developed CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices

funFacts.heading: Fun Facts About Me
funFacts.subtitle: Beyond the code – things that make me, me

items.title: Coffee Enthusiast
items.description: I fuel my development with espresso and curiosity. Always exploring new coffee blends while exploring new code patterns.

items.title: Casual Gamer
items.description: When not coding, you can find me playing indie games. I love puzzle-solving games that challenge my problem-solving skills.

items.title: Travel Bug
items.description: I love exploring new cities and cultures. Every trip teaches me something new about software, technology, and human interaction.

items.title: Lifelong Learner
items.description: I spend weekends reading tech blogs, listening to podcasts, and tinkering with side projects to stay current.

items.title: Music Lover
items.description: Code sounds better with a good soundtrack. I have playlists for debugging, learning, and deep work sessions.

items.title: Innovation Seeker
items.description: Always looking for new technologies and better ways to build. Open source contributions and hackathons are my playground.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: I'd love to hear from you. Send me a message or connect with me on social media.
